subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-04-20 in Washington
subcodes.first_line: It is true in this country in particular growth in all directions has progressed too rapidly. Moderation should be practiced in all things. Be temperate, even in the size of the ships you build and in their speed; in your railroads and the schedules you expect your trains to maintain.
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @principle of balance; moderation; equilibrium
